Configuration file for code formatting based on Google style with specific indentation and alignment.

# Purpose
This configuration file specifies formatting rules for a codebase using the Clang-Format tool. It sets the style to `Google`, defines the `IndentWidth` as 2 spaces, and enforces the use of spaces instead of tabs with `UseTab: Never`. Additionally, it aligns pointers to the right with `PointerAlignment: Right` and sets a `ColumnLimit` of 100 characters per line.
